content: Pick the right model for your task — from budget-friendly to advanced. <1>OpenRouter pricing</1> shown. A 20% service fee applies to usage.

comment.text: This text explains the available AI models and associated pricing, including a 20% service fee. It appears as introductory text within tables displaying AI model options in the AI Tools settings. Translators should ensure accuracy regarding pricing terminology.
